text: Stepping through the glass corridor into this curated space, I am struck by a sense of calm mixed with intrigue. The reflection of empty tables and the quiet order of the room invite contemplation. Yet, when I turn and face the vivid R+D display, I sense an energy pushing outward—a celebration of inquiry and the restless drive of research. I feel the contrast between sterile stillness and the vibrant invitation to innovate. I am both observer and participant in a space intent on questioning and shaping the world. It leaves me feeling curious, slightly disoriented by the blend of structure and creativity, and quietly excited to dwell on the intersections I find here.
